insight: Velocity shutdown NPE in OutgoingMessage.getDefaultListener (Platform.getPlugin() null) on DisconnectEvent: VelocityPlugin.onProxyShutdown nulled the instance while listeners stayed registered, so late DisconnectEvents hit a null plugin. Fix: unregisterListeners(this) BEFORE onPluginStop. Misleading thread names (e.g. Simple Voice Chat executor) are just Velocity reusing pooled executors.
